name: Family-Style Nuggets
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F. Spray a large baking sheet with vegetable cooking spray.
2. On a sheet of waxed paper, combine dry ingredients and mix well.
3. In a small bowl, beat together egg, margarine, and water. Slice each chicken breast into 8 equal chunks. Dip each piece into the egg mixture, then dredge in crumb mixture. Place chicken on prepared baking sheet.
4. Bake chicken pieces, turning once, until cooked through and no longer pink, about 15 minutes. Serve immediately.
Makes approximately 32 nuggets.
